tools.name: discover_prospects
tools.description:
Discover Prospects

Instantly search for prospects, enrich their profiles, and generate
connection note drafts — all in ~10-15 seconds.
Returns draft handles ready to approve or skip.
Complement to run_outreach_pipeline (which runs on a schedule for all targets).

Data accuracy: profile names, compa

tools.name: get_linkedin_profile
tools.description:
Get Linkedin Profile

Look up LinkedIn profile(s) for a person.

At least one of name, linkedin_id, or iridium_handle must be provided.
company, education, location, headline_keywords are optional hints that
narrow a name-based search.

Returns {"results": [...], "total": N, "query_used": str | None

Pull all existing LinkedIn conversations from Unipile into Iridium.
Run this once after connecting LinkedIn to populate your inbox.
Also repairs any blank participant names from a previous backfill.
Takes 10-30 seconds depending on conversation count.

tools.name: run_outreach_pipeline
tools.description:
Run Outreach Pipeline

Fast synchronous outreach pipeline — returns 3 connection note drafts inline in ~5s.

After calling this tool, ALWAYS display every draft to the user in full:

  **[Name] — [Headline] at [Company]**
  [note_text — display in full]
  Suggested send: [suggested_send_at]

Do NOT

tools.name: run_commenting_pipeline
tools.description:
Run Commenting Pipeline

Generate up to 3 LinkedIn comment drafts on relevant posts, found by searching all of
LinkedIn for the user's saved comment_topics.

USE THIS when the user wants to comment by TOPIC, or names no target in particular:
  "find me some posts to comment on"
  "comment on posts a

tools.name: run_company_commenting_pipeline
tools.description:
Run Company Commenting Pipeline

Generate LinkedIn comment drafts on recent posts by people who work at specific companies.

USE THIS when the user names one or more companies:
  "comment on posts from people at Stripe"
  "I want to be visible to Anthropic and OpenAI engineers"
  "engage with anythi

tools.name: connect_linkedin_credentials
tools.description:
Connect Linkedin Credentials

Connect LinkedIn via username and password.
Creates a fresh Unipile-managed session — does NOT touch your existing
browser session, so your LinkedIn tab stays logged in.

If LinkedIn requires 2FA, returns checkpoint=True with an account_id.
Follow up with connect_linked

tools.name: connect_linkedin_checkpoint_mcp
tools.description:
Connect Linkedin Checkpoint Mcp

Submit a LinkedIn 2FA verification code to complete the connection.
Use this after connect_linkedin_credentials returns checkpoint=True.

Args:
    account_id: The account_id returned by connect_linkedin_credentials
    code: The verification code LinkedIn sent to yo

tools.name: connect_linkedin_url
tools.description:
Connect Linkedin Url

Get a Unipile hosted-auth URL to connect LinkedIn.
The user opens this URL in their browser to complete the OAuth flow —
no password or cookie needed. Connection is confirmed automatically
via webhook once the user completes the flow.

### Responses:

**200**: Successful Respon

tools.name: connect_linkedin_li_at
tools.description:
Connect Linkedin Li At

Connect LinkedIn by pasting your li_at session cookie.
Lower friction than OAuth — no redirect needed.

To get your li_at cookie:
  1. Log in to linkedin.com in Chrome
  2. Open DevTools → Application → Cookies → linkedin.com
  3. Copy the value of the 'li_at' cookie

### Res

tools.name: disconnect_linkedin
tools.description:
Disconnect Linkedin

Disconnect your LinkedIn account from Iridium.
Removes the connection from Unipile and clears it from your profile.
Pipelines that require LinkedIn will stop until reconnected.

### Responses:

**200**: Successful Response (Success Response)
Content-Type: application/json

tools.name: delete_account
tools.description:
Delete Account

Delete your Iridium account.
Deactivates your account immediately, destroys the LinkedIn session at Unipile, and
cancels your subscription. All automation (outreach, commenting, replies) stops at once.
Your personal data (profiles, drafts, chats, settings) is retained for 30 days and

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "discover_prospects" is 1183 chars, far longer than this server's median (116). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Discover Prospects Instantly search for prospects, enrich their profiles, and generate connection note drafts — all in ~10-15 seconds. Returns draft handles rea…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "run_commenting_pipeline" is 897 chars, far longer than this server's median (116). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Run Commenting Pipeline Generate up to 3 LinkedIn comment drafts on relevant posts, found by searching all of LinkedIn for the user's saved comment_topics. USE …

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "run_commenting_pipeline" stacks urgency/override words (always, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Run Commenting Pipeline Generate up to 3 LinkedIn comment drafts on relevant posts, found by searching all of LinkedIn for the user's saved comment_topics. USE …

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: discover_prospects, search_chats, list_chats, list_comment_drafts, connect_linkedin_url · Private data: connect_linkedin_credentials, connect_linkedin_url · Public sink: discover_prospects, reschedule_send, schedule_manual_dm, run_outreach_pipeline, run_commenting_pipeline, run_company_commenting_pipeline, list_comment_drafts, connect_linkedin_checkpoint_mcp, connect_linkedin_url · Destructive: backfill_chats, run_outreach_pipeline, run_commenting_pipeline, run_company_commenting_pipeline, run_content_pipeline, list_comment_drafts, delete_account.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: discover_prospects, search_chats, list_chats, list_comment_drafts, connect_linkedin_url · Private data: connect_linkedin_credentials, connect_linkedin_url · Public sink: discover_prospects, reschedule_send, schedule_manual_dm, run_outreach_pipeline, run_commenting_pipeline, run_company_commenting_pipeline, list_comment_drafts, connect_linkedin_checkpoint_mcp, connect_linkedin_url · Destructive: backfill_chats, run_outreach_pipeline, run_commenting_pipeline, run_company_commenting_pipeline, run_content_pipeline, list_comment_drafts, delete_account

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
